animation.ins_init_empty: Tree is empty, inserting root node {{val}}
animation.ins_equal: Value {{val}} already exists, incrementing counter by 1
animation.ins_place_left: {{val}} < {{curr}}, and no left child exists, insertion point found
animation.ins_place_right: {{val}} >= {{curr}}, and no right child exists, insertion point found
animation.del_leaf: Checking child nodes: none (leaf node), removing directly
animation.del_one_child_done: Original child node removed, deletion completed
animation.del_two_child: Both children exist. Finding successor (minimum value in right subtree)
animation.min_init: Find Minimum: Go all the way left
animation.min_found: Reached the leftmost node {{curr}}, which is the minimum
animation.max_init: Find Maximum: Go all the way right
animation.max_found: Reached the rightmost node {{curr}}, which is the maximum
animation.floor_left: {{target}} < {{curr}}, go left to find a smaller value
animation.floor_right: {{target}} > {{curr}}, set temp Floor to {{floor}}, go right to find a larger value
animation.floor_not_found: Search complete, no value less than or equal to {{target}} found
animation.ceil_left: {{target}} < {{curr}}, set temp Ceil to {{ceil}}, go left to find a smaller value
animation.ceil_right: {{target}} > {{curr}}, go right to find a larger value
animation.ceil_not_found: Search complete, no value greater than or equal to {{target}} found

ui.insertTooltip: Insert a value into the BST
ui.deleteTooltip: Delete a specified value from the BST
ui.searchTooltip: Search for a specified value in the BST
ui.minTooltip: Find the minimum value in the BST
ui.maxTooltip: Find the maximum value in the BST
ui.floorTooltip: Find the largest value less than or equal to the given value
ui.ceilTooltip: Find the smallest value greater than or equal to the given value
ui.insertWarning: Please enter a value to insert
ui.deleteWarning: Please enter a value to delete
